mentions.note: Enterprise software company in freefall; Cramer avoiding entire sector; do not break the ball on software names.
SaaS stock down nearly 50%; still sells for 50x earnings; too expensive in current environment; plenty of cheaper enterprise software.
Data monitoring and analytics rallied after good quarter; insulated from AI disruption; demonstrates valuation floor for quality plays.
Huge rally in enterprise software rebound. Has been real dog, but today's spike is program buying mechanical reaction.
Monitoring/observability vendor facing AI disruption headwinds; high-cost legacy software losing favor to AI-native alternatives.
Crushed quarter with accelerating AI and legacy growth; +31% move. First software company to shock upside in months; demonstrates AI-first business model can work alongside legacy cash cow.
